entries.title: ChatGPT Sites
entries.summary: Create that kind of lightweight website or app with Codex.
entries.content:
ChatGPT sites are a way to create and share a live website or lightweight app from Codex.

You describe what you need, work with Codex to build it, then deploy a site that people in your workspace can open and use.

A site can be useful when you have a piece of work that needs a place to live: a launch tracker, a dashboard for a weekly review, a calculator for exploring options, or an onboarding page for a new project.

## What is an internal site or app?

An internal site is a webpage created for people inside your organization or workspace. It gives a team one place to return to for a specific piece of work.

For example, an internal site might bring together the milestones, owners, links, and risks for a product launch. Instead of searching through several documents, teammates can open one page and check the latest information.

A lightweight app is similar, but it includes a way for people to interact with the information. A calculator might ask for a few inputs and show a result. A dashboard might help people review information in a consistent format.

These tools are usually smaller in scope than a full software product. They are often created for one team, one project, or one recurring workflow.

**Format****What it is useful for****Example**
Document Reading or sharing information A written launch plan
Internal site Giving a group one page to revisit A launch tracker with milestones and links
Lightweight app Helping people work with information A calculator for comparing project options
Larger software project Supporting a more complex or long-term product need A custom system with advanced infrastructure requirements

## What ChatGPT sites does

In the Codex desktop app, you can ask Codex to build a site or lightweight app for a real piece of work.

Codex helps create the site and deploy it from the same workspace where you built it. You can review the result, tell Codex what to change, and deploy an updated version when it is ready for other people to use.

ChatGPT sites includes hosting, access controls, storage, and database support.

## Start with a small, focused use case

A good first site solves one clear problem for a defined group of people.

**If your team needs to…****You could create…****Include…**
Track a launch A launch tracker Milestones, owners, links, and risks
Review information each week A dashboard The information used in the review meeting
Compare options A calculator Inputs, assumptions, and a clear result
Help people join a project An onboarding page Background, resources, and next steps
Organize a project An internal page Key links, updates, and reference material

A useful site can be small. The goal is to create something people can open and use for a specific task.

## How to build a site in Codex

### 1. Describe what you need

Start by telling Codex what you want to create and who will use it.

For example:

_Build a launch tracker for our cross-functional team. Include milestones, owners, links, risks, and a weekly update section. Keep the page easy to scan during our weekly review._

### 2. Review the first version

Open the site and check whether it reflects the workflow you had in mind.

Look at the content, structure, labels, and any calculations or interactive elements. Test the main experience as if you were a teammate opening it for the first time.

### 3. Ask Codex to make changes

You can continue the conversation and describe what you want to adjust.

For example:

_Move the risks section higher on the page. Add a filter for milestone owner. Make the weekly updates easier to scan._

### 4. Deploy the site

When the site is ready, ask Codex to deploy it.

Codex will provide a URL for the deployed version. If the site is not deployed automatically, ask:

_Deploy this site and give me the URL._

Open the deployed link in Chrome and check the site once more before sharing it. The in-app browser is not currently supported.

When you are ready to expand access, click the Share button at the end of the Codex turn.

Depending on your workspace settings, you can share a site with specific people or groups. You can also return to the sites page in the Codex sidebar later to review the site settings and manage access.

For Enterprise workspaces, admins control whether ChatGPT sites is available.

A site may contain plans, analysis, project information, or user inputs. Before sharing it, check both the content and the audience.

## Keep your site up to date with an automation

Sites cannot connect directly to live data today. If the information in your site changes regularly, you can create a separate automation to gather the latest updates on a schedule and prepare a refreshed version for your site. For example, an automation could review an approved project tracker every weekday morning, summarize what changed, and organize the latest milestones, owners, and risks in a consistent format. You can then review the updates and refresh your site when needed.

ChatGPT sites is intended for focused websites and lightweight apps. Some projects may still require a different tool or a larger engineering effort.

## Try it

Start with a site that supports a real project your team already understands.

_Build an onboarding site for new members of this project. Include a short overview, key documents, the team directory, common questions, and a first-week checklist. Before you build it, propose a simple page structure and ask me any questions you need._

Or try a calculator:

_Build a lightweight app that helps our team compare project options. Ask me for the inputs, assumptions, and scoring rules first. Then create a results page that shows how the score was calculated._

## Common questions

### Do I need to know how to code?

You can start by describing the site in plain language. Codex can build the first version and make changes based on your feedback.

### Is a site the same as a full software product?

A site is a good fit for a focused internal tool, page, dashboard, or calculator. A more complex product may still require a separate engineering project.

### Can I update a site after I deploy it?

Ask Codex to make the change, review the new version, and deploy the update when it is ready.

### Can a site connect to my organization’s data?

Sites cannot connect directly to live data sources today. For information that changes regularly, use a separate automation to gather updates on a schedule, then review the changes and refresh the site when needed.

### What should admins review?

Admins should confirm whether ChatGPT sites is enabled, who can create and share sites, which sites exist in the workspace, who can access them, and when a site should be removed.
entries.contentZh:
ChatGPT 站点是一种通过 Codex 创建并分享实时网站或轻量级应用的方式。

你描述需求，与 Codex 协作构建，然后部署一个你工作区中的人员可以打开并使用的站点。

当你有一项工作需要一个载体时，站点会非常有用：例如发布追踪器、每周回顾仪表盘、探索选项的计算器，或新项目的入职页面。

## 什么是内部站点或应用？

内部站点是为组织或工作区内部人员创建的网页。它让团队有一个统一的地方来查看特定工作内容。

例如，内部站点可以整合产品发布的里程碑、负责人、链接和风险。团队成员无需搜索多个文档，只需打开一个页面即可查看最新信息。

轻量级应用类似，但它提供了用户与信息交互的方式。计算器可能要求输入几个参数并显示结果。仪表盘则帮助用户以统一格式审查信息。

这些工具的范围通常比完整软件产品小。它们通常为一个团队、一个项目或一个重复性工作流而创建。

**格式** | **适用场景** | **示例**
---|---|---
文档 | 阅读或分享信息 | 书面发布计划
内部站点 | 为团队提供可反复访问的页面 | 包含里程碑和链接的发布追踪器
轻量级应用 | 帮助用户处理信息 | 用于比较项目选项的计算器
大型软件项目 | 支持更复杂或长期的产品需求 | 具有高级基础设施要求的定制系统

## ChatGPT 站点的功能

在 Codex 桌面应用中，你可以让 Codex 为实际工作构建站点或轻量级应用。

Codex 帮助创建站点，并在构建它的同一工作区中部署。你可以审查结果，告诉 Codex 需要修改的内容，并在准备好供他人使用时部署更新版本。

ChatGPT 站点包含托管、访问控制、存储和数据库支持。

## 从小而专注的用例开始

一个好的初始站点应为特定人群解决一个明确的问题。

**如果你的团队需要……** | **你可以创建……** | **包含内容……**
---|---|---
追踪发布 | 发布追踪器 | 里程碑、负责人、链接和风险
每周审查信息 | 仪表盘 | 审查会议中使用的信息
比较选项 | 计算器 | 输入、假设和清晰的结果
帮助人员加入项目 | 入职页面 | 背景、资源和后续步骤
组织项目 | 内部页面 | 关键链接、更新和参考资料

一个有用的站点可以很小。目标是创建人们可以打开并用于特定任务的内容。

## 如何在 Codex 中构建站点

### 1. 描述你的需求

首先告诉 Codex 你想创建什么以及谁会使用它。

例如：

_为我们的跨职能团队构建一个发布追踪器。包含里程碑、负责人、链接、风险和每周更新部分。保持页面易于在每周审查时快速浏览。_

### 2. 审查第一个版本

打开站点，检查它是否反映了你设想的工作流程。

查看内容、结构、标签以及任何计算或交互元素。像团队成员第一次打开它一样测试主要体验。

### 3. 让 Codex 进行修改

你可以继续对话，描述你想要调整的内容。

例如：

_将风险部分移到页面更高位置。添加里程碑负责人筛选器。让每周更新更易于浏览。_

### 4. 部署站点

当站点准备就绪时，让 Codex 部署它。

Codex 会提供已部署版本的 URL。如果站点未自动部署，请询问：

_部署此站点并提供 URL。_

在 Chrome 中打开已部署的链接，并在分享前再次检查站点。目前不支持应用内浏览器。

当你准备扩大访问权限时，点击 Codex 轮次末尾的“分享”按钮。

根据你的工作区设置，你可以与特定人员或群组分享站点。之后你也可以返回 Codex 侧边栏中的站点页面，查看站点设置并管理访问权限。

对于企业工作区，管理员控制 ChatGPT 站点是否可用。

站点可能包含计划、分析、项目信息或用户输入。在分享前，请检查内容和受众。

## 通过自动化保持站点更新

目前站点无法直接连接实时数据。如果站点中的信息定期变化，你可以创建一个单独的自动化，按计划收集最新更新，并为站点准备刷新版本。例如，自动化可以每个工作日早上审查已批准的项目追踪器，总结变化，并以一致格式整理最新的里程碑、负责人和风险。然后你可以审查更新，并在需要时刷新站点。

ChatGPT 站点适用于专注的网站和轻量级应用。某些项目可能仍需要不同的工具或更大的工程投入。

## 尝试一下

从一个支持你团队已了解的实际项目的站点开始。

_为此项目的新成员构建一个入职站点。包含简短概述、关键文档、团队目录、常见问题和第一周检查清单。在构建之前，提出一个简单的页面结构，并询问我任何你需要的问题。_

或者尝试一个计算器：

_构建一个轻量级应用，帮助我们的团队比较项目选项。首先询问我输入、假设和评分规则。然后创建一个显示分数计算方式的结果页面。_

## 常见问题

### 我需要会编程吗？

你可以用自然语言描述站点。Codex 可以构建第一个版本，并根据你的反馈进行修改。

### 站点等同于完整软件产品吗？

站点适用于专注的内部工具、页面、仪表盘或计算器。更复杂的产品可能仍需要单独的工程项目。

### 部署后可以更新站点吗？

让 Codex 进行修改，审查新版本，并在准备就绪时部署更新。

### 站点可以连接到组织的数据吗？

目前站点无法直接连接实时数据源。对于定期变化的信息，使用单独的自动化按计划收集更新，然后审查变化并在需要时刷新站点。

### 管理员应审查什么？

管理员应确认 ChatGPT 站点是否已启用，谁可以创建和分享站点，工作区中存在哪些站点，谁可以访问它们，以及何时应移除站点。

Codex for every role, tool, and workflow | OpenAI

June 2, 2026

[Product](https://openai.com/news/product-releases/)

# Codex for every role, tool, and workflow

New role-specific plugins, Sites, and annotations help teams do more with Codex.

Listen to article 6:28

[Audio 2](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow)

Share

Make Codex work the way your team does

*   [Make Codex work the way your team does](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#make-codex-work-the-way-your-team-does) 
*   [Share your work with sites](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#share-your-work-with-sites) 
*   [Refine your work with annotations](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#refine-your-work-with-annotations) 
*   [Availability and getting started](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#availability-and-getting-started) 

*   [Make Codex work the way your team does](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#make-codex-work-the-way-your-team-does) 
*   [Share your work with sites](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#share-your-work-with-sites) 
*   [Refine your work with annotations](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#refine-your-work-with-annotations) 
*   [Availability and getting started](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#availability-and-getting-started) 

More than 5 million people now use Codex every week. Codex started as a tool for software development, but it's increasingly useful for more kinds of work. Non-developers—including analysts, marketers, operators, designers, researchers, investors, and bankers—[make up about 20% of overall Codex users⁠](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-knowledge-work/) and are growing more than 3x as fast as developers.

Today, we’re introducing new ways to do more of your work with Codex: plugins that adapt Codex to your role and tools, annotations that help you refine the result in place, and a preview of the ability to create interactive websites and apps you can share with your workspace using a URL.

Inside OpenAI, non-technical teams use Codex to build internal apps, prepare executive materials, create dashboards, and turn creative briefs into work that reflects brand and design constraints. At Zapier, teams use Codex to pull knowledge from tools like Slack, Google Docs, and Coda, then turn that context into postmortems, incident response plans, and feature tickets. At NVIDIA, researchers are using Codex to speed up experiment workflows, from finding research ideas to writing scripts for machine learning infrastructure.

00:00

## Make Codex work the way your team does

Codex is most useful when it works the way your team does: connected to the tools you use and ready to create the materials you need.

Plugins help Codex work with the tools, context, and workflows your team already uses. Today, we’re launching six new role-specific plugins that make Codex useful for more kinds of knowledge work, no coding required:

*   Each [role-specific plugin⁠(opens in a new window)](https://github.com/openai/role-based-plugins) bundles the relevant apps, skills, instructions, and workflows. Together, they include 62 popular apps and 110 skills.
*   The [**data analytics plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/32687761205248ae9b517f3d30ad8dd1?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true) helps analysts and business teams answer questions with data. They can explore product and business data, explain why key metrics changed, and create reports and dashboards using tools like Snowflake, Databricks Genie, Hex, and Tableau, with more coming soon.
*   The [**creative production plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/a826391706e14c90816f2ceba9cc8b49?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)helps marketing and creative teams turn a brief into assets they can review. Teams can create campaign boards, make and refine display ad variations, and produce product lifestyle shots or ecommerce-ready image sets with tools like Figma, Canva, Shutterstock, Picsart, and Fal.
*   The [**sales plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/22ec24462a4a410bba1c56c099f6101c?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true) helps sales teams bring customer context into the work that moves deals forward. Sales teams can find high-priority accounts and signals, prepare for customer meetings, complete follow-ups, update customer records, build close plans, and review deals at risk using tools like Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Outreach, Clay, Rox, and Actively.
*   The [**product design plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/37f657dbc41f408d9b05b52d30b8b527?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true) is built for turning early ideas into prototypes teams can review. Teams can explore product directions, audit user flows, prototype from a live URL, and make static screenshots interactive, with work that can be carried forward in tools like Figma and Canva.
*   The [**public equity investing plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/8f2f2fb7215f4688a0853afd038f2a1a?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true) helps investors make sense of market and company information. They can review earnings, compare companies, track signals, and assess whether an investment thesis is strengthening or weakening using information from Moody’s, Daloopa, Datasite, FactSet, LSEG, S&P, PitchBook, and Hebbia.
*   The [**investment banking plugin**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/479468a8d5224cb2976c0fe6c6e599b5?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true) helps bankers turn research and diligence into client-ready materials. They can prepare pitch materials, analyze comparable companies and transactions, and turn diligence into recommendations using trusted data.

Data analytics Creative production Product design Sales Public equity investing

00:00

**Business performance analysis** with the data analytics plugin

Plugins work out of the box. Teams can also adapt them to their workflows or build and share custom plugins for their own systems and processes.

More role-specific plugins are coming soon, including Corporate Finance, Private Equity Investing, Marketing Strategy, Strategy Consulting, and Legal. And this is just the start: we’re building toward an open ecosystem where partners can create and deploy their own plugins directly in Codex and ChatGPT.

## Share your work with sites

Starting in preview for business and enterprise customers, Codex can now create and share interactive, hosted websites and apps.

Sites are a new kind of canvas for your ideas. Codex can take your ideas, analysis, and plans and turn them into dashboards, planners, review workspaces, project boards, galleries, and lightweight tools. Today, sites can be shared with anyone in your workspace via URL, giving teams a shared place to explore work, contribute input, track progress, and make decisions together.

Ask Codex to create a site for an upcoming customer review, and it’ll generate an interactive webpage with the relevant product updates, open questions, usage trends, and next steps for that account. Ask it to build a scenario planner from a financial model, so leaders can compare assumptions instead of reading through tabs in a doc. Ask it to turn launch materials into a living hub where teams can find the latest messaging, milestones, owners, and decisions. Then ask Codex to keep the site up to date as details change.

Instead of adapting work to the limits of a single tool or file, teams can create sites that fit the work. And sites aren’t static. They can also help track progress for a major project, help guide customer service reps, or act as a repository for your team’s creative briefs.

Revenue forecast planner Event operations dashboard Product launch hub

![Image 242: ""](https://images.ctfassets.net/kftzwdyauwt9/5G0zHEnIZRLg0EWpZV602t/47c3851dd1f1cfbdf42d5f630fd36241/blossom-bank-forecasting-light-4k.png?w=3840&q=90&fm=webp)

We’re also working with early partners including Vercel, Wix, Base44, Replit, Lovable, Figma, Webflow, and Emergent as we build towards a sites partner ecosystem.

## Refine your work with annotations

Developers already use annotations in Codex to refine code, Markdown files, and websites Codex creates. With annotations, you point to the exact part you want to refine and tell Codex what needs to change. That way of working now extends to content you create, like documents, spreadsheets, and slides.

Select the navigation bar in a site and ask Codex to update the font. Highlight a claim in an investment thesis and ask Codex where it came from. Mark a chart on a slide and ask for a clearer label. Codex focuses the update on the part you selected, so you can refine your work without starting over or reworking the parts you already like. Annotations make Codex more useful after the first draft, when the work needs judgment, feedback, and iteration.

00:00

## Availability and getting started

Role-specific plugins are rolling out in Codex in supported regions. You can install them from the Codex plugin directory and Codex will help get you set up. Codex can also help you customize a plugin. For Business and Enterprise workspaces, [admins can control⁠(opens in a new window)](https://help.openai.com/articles/20001256) underlying app permissions in workspace settings.

Sites are rolling out in preview for Business and Enterprise teams through the Codex app. [Enterprise admins can enable sites⁠(opens in a new window)](https://developers.openai.com/codex/sites#get-started-with-sites) in admin settings.

Explore more stories about how teams use Codex, or get in touch with our team to get started.

# Codex：适用于每个角色、工具和工作流程

新的角色特定插件、站点和注释帮助团队利用 Codex 完成更多工作。

收听文章 6:28

[音频 2](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow)

分享

让 Codex 按照您团队的方式工作

*   [让 Codex 按照您团队的方式工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#make-codex-work-the-way-your-team-does)
*   [通过站点分享您的工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#share-your-work-with-sites)
*   [通过注释完善您的工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#refine-your-work-with-annotations)
*   [可用性和入门](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#availability-and-getting-started)

*   [让 Codex 按照您团队的方式工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#make-codex-work-the-way-your-team-does)
*   [通过站点分享您的工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#share-your-work-with-sites)
*   [通过注释完善您的工作](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#refine-your-work-with-annotations)
*   [可用性和入门](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow#availability-and-getting-started)

现在每周有超过500万人使用 Codex。Codex 最初是作为软件开发工具诞生的，但它对更多类型的工作越来越有用。非开发者——包括分析师、营销人员、运营人员、设计师、研究人员、投资者和银行家——[约占 Codex 总用户的20%⁠](https://openai.com/index/codex-for-knowledge-work/)，并且增长速度是开发者的三倍以上。

今天，我们推出了利用 Codex 完成更多工作的新方式：适应您角色和工具的插件、帮助您就地完善结果的注释，以及创建交互式网站和应用的预览功能，这些网站和应用可通过 URL 与您的工作空间共享。

在 OpenAI 内部，非技术团队使用 Codex 构建内部应用、准备高管材料、创建仪表板，并将创意简报转化为反映品牌和设计约束的作品。在 Zapier，团队使用 Codex 从 Slack、Google Docs 和 Coda 等工具中提取知识，然后将这些背景信息转化为事后分析、事件响应计划和功能工单。在 NVIDIA，研究人员正在使用 Codex 加速实验工作流程，从寻找研究思路到为机器学习基础设施编写脚本。

00:00

## 让 Codex 按照您团队的方式工作

当 Codex 按照您团队的方式工作时最为有用：连接到您使用的工具，并准备好创建您所需的材料。

插件帮助 Codex 与您团队已使用的工具、背景信息和工作流程协同工作。今天，我们推出了六个新的角色特定插件，使 Codex 对更多类型的知识工作有用，无需编码：

*   每个[角色特定插件⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://github.com/openai/role-based-plugins)都捆绑了相关的应用、技能、指令和工作流程。它们总共包含62个热门应用和110项技能。
*   [**数据分析插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/32687761205248ae9b517f3d30ad8dd1?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)帮助分析师和业务团队用数据回答问题。他们可以探索产品和业务数据，解释关键指标变化的原因，并使用 Snowflake、Databricks Genie、Hex 和 Tableau 等工具创建报告和仪表板，更多工具即将推出。
*   [**创意制作插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/a826391706e14c90816f2ceba9cc8b49?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)帮助营销和创意团队将简报转化为可供审查的素材。团队可以使用 Figma、Canva、Shutterstock、Picsart 和 Fal 等工具创建活动看板，制作和优化展示广告变体，以及生成产品生活方式照片或电商就绪的图像集。
*   [**销售插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/22ec24462a4a410bba1c56c099f6101c?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)帮助销售团队将客户背景信息融入推动交易进展的工作中。销售团队可以使用 Salesforce、HubSpot、Slack、Outreach、Clay、Rox 和 Actively 等工具找到高优先级客户和信号，准备客户会议，完成跟进，更新客户记录，制定成交计划，并审查有风险的交易。
*   [**产品设计插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/37f657dbc41f408d9b05b52d30b8b527?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)专为将早期想法转化为可供团队审查的原型而构建。团队可以探索产品方向，审计用户流程，从实时 URL 制作原型，并使静态截图变得可交互，相关工作可在 Figma 和 Canva 等工具中继续推进。
*   [**公开股权投资插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/8f2f2fb7215f4688a0853afd038f2a1a?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)帮助投资者理解市场和公司信息。他们可以使用 Moody’s、Daloopa、Datasite、FactSet、LSEG、S&P、PitchBook 和 Hebbia 的信息审查财报、比较公司、跟踪信号，并评估投资论点是在加强还是减弱。
*   [**投资银行插件**⁠（在新窗口中打开）](https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/479468a8d5224cb2976c0fe6c6e599b5?openaicom-did=2a812d51-e1aa-4501-8e75-b291b364936b&openaicom_referred=true)帮助银行家将研究和尽职调查转化为客户就绪的材料。他们可以使用可信数据准备推介材料，分析可比公司和交易，并将尽职调查转化为建议。

数据分析 创意制作 产品设计 销售 公开股权投资

00:00

**使用数据分析插件进行业务绩效分析**

插件开箱即用。团队也可以根据自身工作流程进行调整，或为自有系统和流程构建并分享自定义插件。

更多针对特定角色的插件即将推出，包括企业金融、私募股权投资、营销策略、战略咨询和法律领域。而这仅仅是个开始：我们正在构建一个开放生态系统，让合作伙伴能够直接在 Codex 和 ChatGPT 中创建和部署自己的插件。

## 与站点分享你的工作

从面向企业和商业客户的预览版开始，Codex 现在可以创建并分享交互式、托管的网站和应用。

站点是你创意的新画布。Codex 可以将你的想法、分析和计划转化为仪表盘、规划器、审查工作区、项目看板、画廊和轻量级工具。目前，站点可以通过 URL 与工作区中的任何人分享，为团队提供一个共同的空间来探索工作、贡献意见、跟踪进度并共同决策。

让 Codex 为即将到来的客户审查创建一个站点，它将生成一个交互式网页，包含相关的产品更新、未解决问题、使用趋势以及该账户的下一步行动。让它根据财务模型构建一个场景规划器，这样领导者可以比较假设，而不是翻阅文档中的标签页。让它将发布材料转变为一个动态中心，团队可以在其中找到最新的消息、里程碑、负责人和决策。然后让 Codex 在细节变化时保持站点更新。

团队无需将工作适应于单一工具或文件的限制，而是可以创建适合工作的站点。而且站点并非静态。它们还可以帮助跟踪重大项目的进展、指导客户服务代表，或作为团队创意简报的存储库。

收入预测规划器 活动运营仪表盘 产品发布中心

![Image 242: ""](https://images.ctfassets.net/kftzwdyauwt9/5G0zHEnIZRLg0EWpZV602t/47c3851dd1f1cfbdf42d5f630fd36241/blossom-bank-forecasting-light-4k.png?w=3840&q=90&fm=webp)

我们还在与早期合作伙伴合作，包括 Vercel、Wix、Base44、Replit、Lovable、Figma、Webflow 和 Emergent，共同构建站点合作伙伴生态系统。

## 使用注释优化你的工作

开发者已经在 Codex 中使用注释来优化 Codex 创建的代码、Markdown 文件和网站。通过注释，你可以指向需要优化的确切部分，并告诉 Codex 需要更改什么。这种工作方式现在扩展到你创建的内容，如文档、电子表格和幻灯片。

选择站点中的导航栏，让 Codex 更新字体。高亮投资论点中的一项声明，让 Codex 说明其来源。标记幻灯片上的图表，要求更清晰的标签。Codex 会将更新集中在你选择的部分，这样你就可以优化工作，而无需从头开始或重新修改你已经喜欢的部分。注释使 Codex 在初稿之后更有用，此时工作需要判断、反馈和迭代。

00:00

## 可用性与入门

特定角色的插件正在受支持区域的 Codex 中逐步推出。你可以从 Codex 插件目录安装它们，Codex 将帮助你完成设置。Codex 还可以帮助你自定义插件。对于商业和企业工作区，[管理员可以在工作区设置中控制⁠(在新窗口中打开)](https://help.openai.com/articles/20001256)底层应用权限。

站点正在通过 Codex 应用向商业和企业团队推出预览版。[企业管理员可以在管理设置中启用站点⁠(在新窗口中打开)](https://developers.openai.com/codex/sites#get-started-with-sites)。

entries.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
entries.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.
entries.content:
OpenAI today released [a new report⁠(opens in a new window)](https://cdn.openai.com/pdf/the-next-era-of-knowledge-work.pdf), _The Next Era of Knowledge Work_, showing how Codex is no longer just a coding tool. Increasingly, it’s helping people across professions automate routine work, move faster, and eliminate the bottlenecks of modern knowledge work.

Codex now has more than 5 million weekly active users, up more than 6x since the launch of the desktop app in February. While developers remain the largest user group, knowledge workers now represent about 20 percent of users and are growing more than three times as fast.

The data suggests a broader shift is underway. Knowledge workers primarily use Codex to create reports, spreadsheets, presentations, contracts, and other work products. They are also increasingly using it for research, data analysis, workflow automation, and building lightweight tools that previously required engineering support.

The fastest-growing knowledge-worker tasks are data analysis, research, and knowledge artifact creation. At the same time, users are increasingly running multiple Codex tasks in parallel, allowing them to investigate data, draft materials, and automate workflows simultaneously. This kind of increased velocity could reshape AI’s long-term impact on work: Codex can help people take on more ambitious projects, leading to greater scope of their roles, and potentially accelerate career advancement.

Across industries, the pattern is similar: people are using Codex to reduce the friction of modern work. It helps them find information buried across systems, coordinate work across tools and teams, produce high-quality deliverables, and move projects through review and approval processes.
entries.contentZh:
OpenAI 今日发布[新报告⁠(在新窗口中打开)](https://cdn.openai.com/pdf/the-next-era-of-knowledge-work.pdf)《知识工作的下一个时代》，展示了 Codex 已不再仅仅是编码工具。它正日益帮助各行业从业者自动化常规工作、提升效率，并消除现代知识工作中的瓶颈。

Codex 目前拥有超过 500 万周活跃用户，自 2 月桌面应用上线以来增长超过 6 倍。虽然开发者仍是最大用户群体，但知识工作者现已占用户总数的约 20%，且增速是前者的三倍以上。

数据表明更广泛的变革正在发生。知识工作者主要使用 Codex 创建报告、电子表格、演示文稿、合同及其他工作成果。他们也越来越频繁地将其用于研究、数据分析、工作流自动化，以及构建此前需要工程支持才能完成的轻量级工具。

增长最快的知识工作者任务包括数据分析、研究和知识成果创建。与此同时，用户正越来越多地并行运行多个 Codex 任务，使其能够同时进行数据调研、材料起草和工作流自动化。这种效率提升可能重塑 AI 对工作的长期影响：Codex 能帮助人们承担更具雄心的项目，从而拓展其职责范围，并可能加速职业发展。

各行业的模式相似：人们正利用 Codex 减少现代工作中的摩擦。它帮助用户查找分散在多个系统中的信息、协调跨工具和团队的工作、产出高质量交付物，并推动项目完成审核与审批流程。
entries.titleZh: Codex正成为每个人的生产力工具
entries.summaryZh: 《知识工作的下一个时代》报告探讨了Codex如何通过AI驱动的研究、数据分析、工作流自动化和内容创作来改变生产力。

entries.title: Enterprise plans can manage admin permissions with custom roles We extended the existing custom roles framework by adding admin permissions.
entries.summary: Enterprise plans can manage admin permissions with custom roles We extended the existing custom roles framework by adding admin permissions. Admin permissions give members access to specific administrative areas, like billing or privacy, without the need to make them Owners. For more information, see Manage custom roles on Enterprise plans.

entries.contentZh:
企业版计划可通过自定义角色管理管理员权限  
我们扩展了现有的自定义角色框架，新增了管理员权限。管理员权限允许成员访问特定管理区域（如账单或隐私设置），而无需将其设为所有者。更多信息，请参阅《企业版计划中的自定义角色管理》。

entries.title: The advisor tool now supports a max_tokens parameter to cap the advisor model's output per call, reducing latency and output token cost for workloads that don't need full-length ad
entries.summary: The advisor tool now supports a max_tokens parameter to cap the advisor model's output per call, reducing latency and output token cost for workloads that don't need full-length advisor responses. Set tools[].max_tokens on the advisor tool definition; see Capping advisor output. On the Claude API, you are no longer billed for a request when it returns stop_reason: "refusal" without Claude having generated any output. See Streaming refusals for detecting and handling refusals.
entries.content: The advisor tool now supports a max_tokens parameter to cap the advisor model's output per call, reducing latency and output token cost for workloads that don't need full-length advisor responses. Set tools[].max_tokens on the advisor tool definition; see Capping advisor output. On the Claude API, you are no longer billed for a request when it returns stop_reason: "refusal" without Claude having generated any output. See Streaming refusals for detecting and handling refusals.
entries.contentZh: 顾问工具现在支持`max_tokens`参数，用于限制每次调用时顾问模型的输出长度，从而减少不需要完整顾问响应的任务的延迟和输出token成本。在顾问工具定义中设置`tools[].max_tokens`；参见《限制顾问输出》。在Claude API中，当请求返回`stop_reason: "refusal"`且Claude未生成任何输出时，您将不再被计费。参见《流式拒绝》以检测和处理拒绝情况。

entries.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
entries.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
entries.content:
Jun 01, 2026

|

15 min read

From the jellyfish pre-show to our “TPU Training Day” film, see how Gemini helped make I/O happen this year.

* * *

* * *

![Image 1: A collage of I/O-related images, including the Antigravity Coffee Co. pop-up, a colorful jellyfish and a still from the Timmy TPU video. The word AI repeats three times on the left of the image, and there are colorful icons, including a sparkle, as well.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/AI_IO.width-200.format-webp.webp)

[Audio 3](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/media/tts_audio_85177_umbriel_2026_06_01_17_22_33.wav)

Listen to article

[[duration]] minutes

This content is generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental

[Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/) was all about how we’re making AI helpful for everyone in new ways. But we didn’t just make announcements about our innovations in AI at I/O —we used those tools to bring I/O to life, too.

It’s both a strange and exciting moment to be building anything. We're living through an incredible shift where AI tools are getting better each month, effectively rewriting the rules of what we can create.

This year, we challenged ourselves to use the same AI we were putting on stage to out-innovate, out-create and out-efficient ourselves.

We moved faster than ever and prototyped in real-time — blending human artistry with experimental technology — with no better example than the "Timmy TPU" film.

But the reward is showing how these tools unlock creativity and offload the mundane tasks, giving the team their best hours back for the parts they are uniquely suited to do. When done right, the event is amazing on its own, and, as a viewer, you stop thinking about how AI was used. That shift is the opportunity we want to share, because people keep asking, “What can you really do with AI?”

Keep reading to learn which AI tools we used — and how we prompted them — to help make I/O 2026 happen.

## AI x Film

### “TPU Training Day” short film

**The AI products & models:** Google AI Studio; experimental DeepMind models; Gemini Omni; Nano Banana

**What we did:** We created a short film starring a bunch of TPUs getting ready to do some heavy lifting for I/O 2026.

**How we did it:** This project started with a question: Could we make an animated film with the simplest materials — cardboard and markers — and then use AI to bring it to life? We worked with director Laurie Rowan and Nexus Studios to blend puppets, traditional animation and AI — keeping human craft and artistry right at the heart of "TPU Training Day" (also known as "Timmy TPU").

First, we captured character performances through puppetry and simple 3D animation. This gave us full control over framing and camera movement. We then used Nano Banana to generate stylized first frames from that raw footage. To keep frames consistent, we built a custom tool inside Google AI Studio. This let us test Nano Banana frames at scale, ensuring pixel-perfect matches before generating sequences.

We merged the base animation and stylized frames using Gemini Omni and other experimental models. This elevated the film to a cinematic level while retaining the original human intent. Preserving these tiny, human imperfections is what gives puppet films their charm, and our AI pipelines were designed to protect those details.

## AI x Visual Design

### I/O visual brand identity

**The AI products & models:** Gemini models and Nano Banana

**What we did:** We created the visual brand identity for I/O 2026, landing on a four-color gradient with overlapping transparencies and interlocking icons.

**How we did it:** Our brand identity was a close collaboration between our team and AI. We started by feeding Gemini models our past brand guidelines and five years of I/O recaps. The early outputs didn't quite hit the mark, so we ran some micro-experiments. We generated new imagery and iteratively fed outputs back into Nano Banana with feedback. We also used Nano Banana to explore icon styles. Finally, we landed on flat 2D icons that dynamically transform into hyper-textured 3D icons. This created a cohesive brand expression across keynotes, physical signage and digital apps.

Here’s a prompt we used to explore icon styles with Nano Banana:

Our I/O YouTube trailer showcased our final icon style:

## AI x Immersive Experiences

### The I/O pre-show: Jellectronica

**The AI products & models:** Google Antigravity; Google Colab; Google CoralNPU; Google Flow Music; Lyria 3 Pro

**What we did:** We kicked off the pre-show with Jellectronica, a generative music experiment in partnership with the Monterey Bay Aquarium that translated moon jelly movements into sound with Lyria 3 Pro.

**How we did it:** We trained a YOLO8 model in Google Colab, and then ran it on Google’s Coral NPU. This tracked jellyfish movement to control the music, which was made using Google Flow Music and the Lyria API. For example, more jellies in the bass section meant louder, more energetic bass. We also vibe-coded a mass stem generator in Google Antigravity to automate the production of music stems, like bass, chords, melody and drums.

### The I/O pre-show: Infinite Scaler and Code the Countdown

**The AI products & models:** Google AI Studio; Gemini API; Gemini Canvas; Google Antigravity; Lyria 3; Nano Banana

**What we did:** Infinite Scaler, another part of the pre-show, was a video game where players competed and generated the levels as they played.

**How we did it:** We wanted players to build infinite 3D worlds quickly just using 2D image generation. To do this, we used Nano Banana to generate sprite sheets from user prompts and reference images via the Gemini API. We sent foreground elements back to Nano Banana to generate normal, roughness and emission maps. This inferred depth, letting us map textures to a 3D cardboard box rendered in WebGL before adding them to the global stack of worlds. We used Google AI Studio for rapid prototyping before moving to Google Antigravity for development; we generated in-game music entirely using Lyria 3.

You can [play the game and explore the levels we built together here](http://infinitescaler.withgoogle.com/).

Here’s a sample user prompt for Infinite Scaler:

Feeding that back into the Gemini API for a level plan gave us this prompt:

That prompt resulted in this sprite sheet. The game’s sprite sheets combined multiple elements in a consistent template that used green screen backgrounds for easy masking.

This process resulted in a fully playable 3D level like this:

Finally, we played a generated countdown coded by creators worldwide in our Code the Countdown challenge. [We asked you](https://x.com/googledevs/status/2050245538730168343) to design numbers between 1 and 10 in Canvas or AI Studio, then stitched them into a countdown powered by code.

### Antigravity Coffee Co. pop-up

**The AI products & models:** Flutter; Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform; Google Antigravity; Nano Banana

**What we did:** We created an app for I/O attendees to design and order lattes with custom art, then build their own version of the most unhinged coffee app ever.

**How we did it:** We used generative UI and the A2UI protocol with Flutter to build adaptive interfaces that changed in real-time. This replaced static forms with dynamic user interactions. Firebase bridged the frontend to models like Nano Banana. This handled complex reasoning and content generation. A single Flutter codebase delivered a high-quality, zero-latency experience across different hardware. We relied on Google Cloud and Firebase — including Cloud Functions, Firestore and Cloud Ops. This solved the complexity of building and monitoring modern generative AI apps. Attendees also used Google Antigravity's agentic coding to quickly build their own order apps.

## AI x Creative Delight

### Speaker title cards

**The AI products & models:** Gemini Omni; Google Flow; Nano Banana Pro

**What we did:** Each speaker got their own custom generated title card made with our image and video generation models.

**How we did it:** Josh Woodward — our VP of Google Labs & Google Gemini — is a great example. On stage, attendees saw a digital Josh riding Chrome Dino, then dunking a basketball.

We used Nano Banana Pro to generate core assets like ingredient reference sheets. We used these ingredients to storyboard, trying variations and adding personal details. In Google Flow, we first used Veo to help prototype actions and generate animations like a slam dunk. We also generated animations with Gemini Omni in Google Flow, which was particularly helpful when dealing with intricate sports movements. Detailed text prompts kept the AI outputs consistent with our reference sheets. Finally, we composited and time-remapped raw motion from the generated videos into polished titles.

Here’s a prompt we used for our ingredients reference sheet:

Here’s a Google Flow video prompt we used after that:

### Sticker swag

**The AI products & models:** Gemini and Nano Banana

**What we did:** We generated and printed custom I/O stickers for attendees on the spot.

**How we did it:** We built an interactive sticker game on a custom web app. Players had 20 seconds to catch falling prompts using an Android bot. There were over 100 prompt categories — from blueberries and disco balls to lasers and wood. Players selected two prompts, or hit "I'm feeling lucky" for a random mix. Our backend — using Nano Banana for Gemini and Android — fused these choices together. This created a highly personalized, custom I/O sticker design. Think of a 3D "I/O" made of solid gold waffles or a gummy bear motherboard. Designs were printed immediately for attendees to collect.

Here’s an example prompt we used to generate the sticker designs, starting with some general guidelines:

Next, we provided additional details about individual elements like color, lighting and in the example below, the iconic “I/O” shape:
entries.contentZh:
2026年6月1日

|

15分钟阅读

从水母暖场秀到我们的“TPU训练日”影片，看看Gemini如何助力今年I/O大会的呈现。

* * *

* * *

![图片1：一张I/O相关图片的拼贴，包括Antigravity Coffee Co.快闪店、一只色彩斑斓的水母以及Timmy TPU视频的剧照。图片左侧“AI”一词重复三次，还有彩色图标，包括一个闪光图标。](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/AI_IO.width-200.format-webp.webp)

[音频3](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/media/tts_audio_85177_umbriel_2026_06_01_17_22_33.wav)

收听文章

[[时长]]分钟

此内容由Google AI生成。生成式AI处于实验阶段

[Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/) 的主题是我们如何以全新方式让AI对每个人都更有帮助。但在I/O大会上，我们不仅发布了AI创新成果——还利用这些工具将I/O大会变为现实。

构建任何事物，此刻既奇妙又令人兴奋。我们正经历一场不可思议的变革，AI工具每月都在进步，实际上正在重写我们所能创造的规则。

今年，我们挑战自我，使用与台上展示相同的AI，力求在创新、创造和效率上超越自我。

我们比以往任何时候都行动更快，并实时进行原型设计——将人类艺术与实验技术相融合——而“Timmy TPU”影片就是最好的例证。

但回报在于，这些工具如何释放创造力，并卸下繁琐任务，让团队将最佳时间投入到他们最擅长的工作中。如果运用得当，活动本身会令人惊叹，而作为观众，你不再去想AI是如何被使用的。这种转变正是我们想分享的机会，因为人们一直在问：“AI到底能做什么？”

继续阅读，了解我们使用了哪些AI工具——以及如何提示它们——来助力I/O 2026的呈现。

## AI x 电影

### “TPU训练日”短片

**使用的AI产品与模型：** Google AI Studio；实验性DeepMind模型；Gemini Omni；Nano Banana

**我们做了什么：** 我们制作了一部短片，主角是一群TPU，它们正准备为I/O 2026承担繁重任务。

**我们如何做到的：** 这个项目始于一个问题：我们能否用最简单的材料——纸板和马克笔——制作一部动画电影，然后利用AI让它活起来？我们与导演Laurie Rowan和Nexus Studios合作，将木偶、传统动画和AI融为一体，将人类工艺和艺术性置于“TPU训练日”（又名“Timmy TPU”）的核心。

首先，我们通过木偶表演和简单的3D动画捕捉角色表演。这让我们完全控制了构图和摄像机运动。然后，我们使用Nano Banana从原始素材生成风格化的首帧。为了保持帧的一致性，我们在Google AI Studio内构建了一个自定义工具。这让我们能够大规模测试Nano Banana帧，在生成序列之前确保像素级完美匹配。

我们使用Gemini Omni和其他实验性模型将基础动画和风格化帧合并。这使影片达到了电影级别，同时保留了原始的人类意图。保留这些微小的人类不完美之处正是木偶电影的迷人之处，而我们的AI流程旨在保护这些细节。

## AI x 视觉设计

### I/O视觉品牌标识

**使用的AI产品与模型：** Gemini模型和Nano Banana

**我们做了什么：** 我们为I/O 2026创建了视觉品牌标识，最终确定了一种四色渐变，带有重叠透明度和互锁图标。

**我们如何做到的：** 我们的品牌标识是团队与AI紧密合作的结果。我们首先将过去的品牌指南和五年的I/O回顾输入Gemini模型。早期的输出并不完全符合要求，因此我们进行了一些微实验。我们生成了新图像，并将输出反复反馈给Nano Banana，并附上反馈。我们还使用Nano Banana探索图标风格。最终，我们确定了平面2D图标，这些图标可以动态转变为超纹理3D图标。这为主题演讲、实体标牌和数字应用创建了统一的品牌表达。

以下是我们使用Nano Banana探索图标风格时使用的一个提示：

我们的I/O YouTube预告片展示了最终的图标风格：

## AI x 沉浸式体验

### I/O暖场秀：Jellectronica

**使用的AI产品与模型：** Google Antigravity；Google Colab；Google CoralNPU；Google Flow Music；Lyria 3 Pro

**我们做了什么：** 我们以Jellectronica开启了暖场秀，这是一项与蒙特雷湾水族馆合作的生成式音乐实验，利用Lyria 3 Pro将月亮水母的运动转化为声音。

**我们如何做到的：** 我们在Google Colab中训练了一个YOLO8模型，然后在Google的Coral NPU上运行。这通过追踪水母运动来控制音乐，音乐是使用Google Flow Music和Lyria API制作的。例如，低音部分的水母越多，低音就越响亮、越有活力。我们还在Google Antigravity中通过氛围编码生成了一个批量分轨生成器，用于自动生成音乐分轨，如低音、和弦、旋律和鼓点。

### I/O暖场秀：无限缩放器和代码倒计时

**使用的AI产品与模型：** Google AI Studio；Gemini API；Gemini Canvas；Google Antigravity；Lyria 3；Nano Banana

**我们做了什么：** 无限缩放器是暖场秀的另一部分，是一款视频游戏，玩家在游戏过程中竞争并生成关卡。

**我们如何做到的：** 我们希望玩家仅使用2D图像生成就能快速构建无限的3D世界。为此，我们使用Nano Banana通过Gemini API根据用户提示和参考图像生成精灵表。我们将前景元素发送回Nano Banana，以生成法线贴图、粗糙度贴图和发光贴图。这推断出深度，让我们能够将纹理映射到在WebGL中渲染的3D纸板盒上，然后再将其添加到全局世界堆栈中。我们使用Google AI Studio进行快速原型设计，然后转向Google Antigravity进行开发；我们完全使用Lyria 3生成了游戏内音乐。

你可以[在这里玩游戏并探索我们一起构建的关卡](http://infinitescaler.withgoogle.com/)。

以下是无限缩放器的示例用户提示：

将其反馈回Gemini API以获取关卡计划，我们得到了这个提示：

该提示生成了这个精灵表。游戏的精灵表将多个元素组合到一个一致的模板中，该模板使用绿幕背景以便于遮罩。

这个过程产生了一个完全可玩的3D关卡，如下所示：

最后，我们在“代码倒计时”挑战中播放了由全球创作者编写的生成式倒计时。[我们邀请你](https://x.com/googledevs/status/2050245538730168343)在Canvas或AI Studio中设计1到10之间的数字，然后将它们拼接成一个由代码驱动的倒计时。

### Antigravity Coffee Co.快闪店

**AI 产品与模型：** Flutter；Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform；Google Antigravity；Nano Banana

**我们的成果：** 我们为 I/O 参会者打造了一款应用，用于设计并订购带有定制图案的拿铁咖啡，进而构建出有史以来最疯狂的咖啡应用个人版本。

**实现方式：** 我们利用生成式 UI 和基于 Flutter 的 A2UI 协议，构建了实时变化的自适应界面。这用动态用户交互取代了静态表单。Firebase 将前端与 Nano Banana 等模型连接起来，处理复杂的推理和内容生成。单一 Flutter 代码库在不同硬件上提供了高质量、零延迟的体验。我们依赖 Google Cloud 和 Firebase——包括 Cloud Functions、Firestore 和 Cloud Ops。这解决了构建和监控现代生成式 AI 应用的复杂性。参会者还使用 Google Antigravity 的智能体编码功能，快速构建了自己的点单应用。

## AI x 创意乐趣

### 演讲者标题卡片

**AI 产品与模型：** Gemini Omni；Google Flow；Nano Banana Pro

**我们的成果：** 每位演讲者都获得了由我们的图像和视频生成模型定制的专属标题卡片。

**实现方式：** 以 Josh Woodward——Google Labs 和 Google Gemini 的副总裁——为例。在舞台上，参会者看到数字版 Josh 骑着 Chrome 恐龙，然后扣篮。

我们使用 Nano Banana Pro 生成核心素材，如配料参考表。利用这些配料进行故事板创作，尝试不同变体并添加个人细节。在 Google Flow 中，我们首先使用 Veo 来帮助原型化动作并生成动画，例如扣篮。我们还通过 Google Flow 中的 Gemini Omni 生成动画，这在处理复杂体育动作时尤其有用。详细的文本提示确保 AI 输出与我们的参考表保持一致。最后，我们将生成视频中的原始动作进行合成和时间重映射，制作成精美的标题。

以下是我们用于配料参考表的提示词：

以下是之后使用的 Google Flow 视频提示词：

### 贴纸周边

**AI 产品与模型：** Gemini 和 Nano Banana

**我们的成果：** 我们现场为参会者生成并打印了定制的 I/O 贴纸。

**实现方式：** 我们在一个自定义网页应用上构建了互动贴纸游戏。玩家有 20 秒时间，使用 Android 机器人接住掉落的提示词。提示词类别超过 100 种——从蓝莓、迪斯科球到激光和木材。玩家选择两个提示词，或点击“我手气不错”随机组合。我们的后端——使用 Nano Banana 集成 Gemini 和 Android——将这些选择融合在一起。这创造出了高度个性化的定制 I/O 贴纸设计。想象一下由纯金华夫饼制成的 3D“I/O”，或者软糖主板。设计立即打印出来，供参会者收集。

以下是我们用于生成贴纸设计的示例提示词，从一些通用指南开始：

接下来，我们提供了关于单个元素的额外细节，如颜色、光照，以及下面示例中标志性的“I/O”形状：
entries.titleZh: 我们如何使用Gemini构建Google I/O 2026
entries.summaryZh: 了解谷歌员工如何利用AI制作Google I/O 2026。

entries.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
entries.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.
entries.content:
Today, OpenAI frontier models and Codex are generally available on AWS, opening a new path for millions of AWS customers to build with OpenAI through the platform they already use to run their business.
For enterprises, this removes one of the biggest barriers to AI adoption: getting frontier AI into production through existing security, compliance, procurement, billing, and governance workflows.Customers can now bring OpenAI capabilities into AWS environments with the controls their teams already trust, helping them move faster from evaluation to real deployment.

## Bringing OpenAI capabilities into AWS environments

OpenAI on AWS gives enterprises access to OpenAI frontier capabilities, a familiar AWS operating model, and a faster path to production. They are available in two ways:

[**Codex on Amazon Bedrock**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://developers.openai.com/codex/amazon-bedrock) brings OpenAI’s leading software engineering agent - used by more than 5 million people every week - into AWS, helping teams write, review, debug, and modernize code in the environments where they already build and ship.
Together, these offerings help customers adopt OpenAI with less friction and ship with the best models available right in AWS, in both Commercial and GovCloud regions.

## Helping customers move from interest to implementation

As customers begin using these capabilities, the AWS path helps reduce friction around procurement, security review, and production readiness. By making OpenAI capabilities available within familiar AWS environments, organizations can spend less time navigating operational barriers and more time building.

## What’s next, including cyber availability

OpenAI on AWS is the start of a broader path for customers to bring frontier AI into the environments where they already build, govern, and ship. We’ll continue expanding the OpenAI capabilities available through AWS so teams can move from evaluation to production with less friction and more confidence.

That includes future availability for Daybreak, OpenAI’s vision for changing how software is built and defended. Daybreak, which includes cyber models and Codex Security, is designed to help cyber defenders see risk earlier, act sooner, and make software more resilient by design by bringing secure code review, threat modeling, patch validation, dependency risk analysis, detection, and remediation guidance into the everyday development loop.

As specialized capabilities like Daybreak become available to customers, AWS can provide an important path for security teams to adopt them using the security, governance, procurement, and operational frameworks they already use.
Together, OpenAI and AWS can help more organizations put advanced AI to work in production.
entries.contentZh:
今天，OpenAI前沿模型和Codex已在AWS上全面可用，为数百万AWS客户开辟了一条新路径，让他们能够通过已用于运营业务的同一平台，使用OpenAI进行构建。

对企业而言，这消除了AI应用的最大障碍之一：通过现有的安全、合规、采购、计费和治理工作流程，将前沿AI投入生产。客户现在可以将OpenAI能力引入AWS环境，并利用其团队已信任的控制措施，从而更快地从评估阶段过渡到实际部署。

## 将OpenAI能力引入AWS环境

AWS上的OpenAI让企业能够访问OpenAI前沿能力、熟悉的AWS运营模式以及更快的生产路径。它们可通过两种方式获得：

[**Amazon Bedrock上的Codex**⁠(在新窗口中打开)](https://developers.openai.com/codex/amazon-bedrock)将OpenAI领先的软件工程代理（每周被超过500万人使用）引入AWS，帮助团队在已用于构建和交付的环境中编写、审查、调试和现代化代码。

这些产品共同帮助客户以更少的摩擦采用OpenAI，并在AWS的商业区域和GovCloud区域中，使用最佳可用模型进行交付。

## 帮助客户从兴趣走向实施

随着客户开始使用这些能力，AWS路径有助于减少采购、安全审查和生产就绪方面的摩擦。通过在熟悉的AWS环境中提供OpenAI能力，组织可以减少在应对运营障碍上的时间，将更多精力用于构建。

## 下一步计划，包括网络可用性

AWS上的OpenAI是客户将前沿AI引入已用于构建、治理和交付环境的更广泛路径的开端。我们将继续扩展通过AWS提供的OpenAI能力，使团队能够以更少的摩擦和更高的信心从评估阶段过渡到生产阶段。

这包括未来对Daybreak的可用性支持——这是OpenAI对改变软件构建和防御方式的愿景。Daybreak包含网络模型和Codex Security，旨在通过将安全代码审查、威胁建模、补丁验证、依赖风险分析、检测和修复指导纳入日常开发循环，帮助网络防御者更早发现风险、更快采取行动，并使软件在设计上更具弹性。

随着Daybreak等专业能力对客户开放，AWS可以为安全团队提供一条重要路径，让他们使用已采用的安全、治理、采购和运营框架来采用这些能力。

OpenAI和AWS携手，可以帮助更多组织将先进AI投入生产应用。

# Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.

[Zahra Thompson Contributing writer](https://blog.google/authors/zahra-barnes/)

May 29, 2026

* * *

Heads up, builders and devs: You can test your knowledge of [our I/O 2026 announcements](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/google-io-2026-all-our-announcements/) with this [vibe coded quiz](https://ai.studio/apps/bundled/google_io_2026_quiz?fullscreenApplet=true) built in Google AI Studio.

In case you missed it, at [Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/), we announced [new ways and places you can use Google AI Studio](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-ai-studio-io-2026/). With Google AI Studio, powered by the Antigravity coding agent, you can bring ideas to life with the latest Gemini models even if you’re not a seasoned developer.

As a case in point, I vibe coded this quiz myself — and I'm an editor with zero coding background, not a developer. To make the quiz, I used [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/) to generate a prompt for Google AI Studio to build the exact quiz I envisioned. I uploaded sources including announcements and design inspiration. Gemini delivered a helpful, creative, highly specific prompt I took to Google AI Studio. I refined the prompt based on the previews, and added the actual quiz text.

Check out the quiz to get to know Google AI Studio, then [try building something yourself](http://aistudio.google.com/apps).

## Google I/O 2026: Pop Quiz

Click each icon to test your knowledge of our I/O announcements about new Gemini models, Search updates and more.

[See more](https://ai.studio/apps/bundled/google_io_2026_quiz?fullscreenApplet=true)

![Image 3: The words I/O quiz in rainbow colors against a black background](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/IOQuiz2026_social.width-800.format-webp.webp)

POSTED IN:

*   [AI](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/)
*   [Developer tools](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/)

# 参加我们的 I/O 2026 测验，在 Google AI Studio 中通过氛围编码完成。

[Zahra Thompson 特约撰稿人](https://blog.google/authors/zahra-barnes/)

2026 年 5 月 29 日

* * *

各位构建者和开发者注意：你可以通过这个在 Google AI Studio 中构建的[氛围编码测验](https://ai.studio/apps/bundled/google_io_2026_quiz?fullscreenApplet=true)，来测试你对[我们 I/O 2026 公告](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/google-io-2026-all-our-announcements/)的了解程度。

如果你错过了，在 [Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/) 上，我们宣布了[你可以使用 Google AI Studio 的新方式和场景](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-ai-studio-io-2026/)。借助由 Antigravity 编码代理驱动的 Google AI Studio，即使你不是经验丰富的开发者，也能利用最新的 Gemini 模型将创意变为现实。

举个例子，这个测验就是我自己通过氛围编码完成的——我是一名编辑，完全没有编码背景，并非开发者。为了制作这个测验，我使用了 [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/) 来生成一个提示词，让 Google AI Studio 构建出我设想中的精确测验。我上传了包括公告和设计灵感在内的素材。Gemini 提供了一个有用、富有创意且高度具体的提示词，我将其带到了 Google AI Studio。我根据预览效果优化了提示词，并添加了实际的测验文本。

来看看这个测验，了解 Google AI Studio，然后[尝试自己构建一些东西](http://aistudio.google.com/apps)。

## Google I/O 2026：快速测验

点击每个图标，测试你对我们在 I/O 上关于新 Gemini 模型、搜索更新等公告的了解程度。

entries.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
entries.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
entries.content:
May 29, 2026

|

9 min read

With Gemini Omni, Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create, while Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.

* * *

* * *

![Image 1: Gemini Omni & Gemini 3.5 hero](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Gemini_Omni_and_Gemini_3.5_heroso.width-200.format-webp.webp)

[Audio 3](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/media/tts_audio_85175_umbriel_2026_05_29_18_43_56.wav)

Listen to article

[[duration]] minutes

This content is generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental

At [Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/), we announced our latest models: [Gemini Omni](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni/) and the [Gemini 3.5](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/) family of models.

Gemini Omni is our new model that can create anything from any input, starting with video. With Omni, you can combine images, audio, video and text as input and generate high-quality videos grounded in Gemini's real-world knowledge. You can also easily edit your videos through conversation.

Then there’s Gemini 3.5, our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action. This represents a major leap forward in building more capable, intelligent agents. We’re kicking off the series by releasing 3.5 Flash. It delivers frontier performance for agents and coding, excelling at complex long-horizon tasks that deliver real-world utility.

To give you a clearer understanding of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 Flash, here are 9 demos of what they can help you do.

## Gemini Omni

**Edit your videos through conversation.** One capability that makes Omni special is that it gives you an easier way to edit video — with natural language. Every instruction builds on the last. Your characters stay consistent, the physics hold up and the scene remembers what came before. That means you can transform the world around you. Change specific things, or change everything. Your video becomes the starting point for something you never could have filmed yourself.

Prompt: Make the sculpture out of bubbles.

**Reimagine the action.** Take a video you shot and just ask Omni to change what’s happening. Edit the action, add in new characters or objects or transform a moment into something unexpected.

Prompt: Dim the lights in the room. Put a black and white checkerboard room inside a glass sphere that floats tracking above the hand, inside it contains a recursive representation of the same hand holding the sphere, creating an infinite recursive of rooms. Camera slowly gets closer into the sphere, creating a video loop.

**Refine your videos across multiple turns.** Change the environment, angle, style or even specific details, without ever losing the thread of your original scene. Scroll through the carousel to see how edits build on each other.

## Gemini 3.5 Flash

**Take on agentic tasks at scale.** 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models on multiple dimensions, at the speeds you have come to expect from the Flash series. This balance of speed and performance makes 3.5 Flash ideal for tackling long-horizon agentic tasks. Here, powered by Antigravity, 3.5 Flash executes multi-step workflows to automatically rename and categorize unstructured assets based on dynamic criteria.

3.5 Flash powered by Antigravity

When coupled with the updated Antigravity harness, 3.5 Flash becomes a powerful engine for deploying collaborative subagents to tackle problems at scale for the most demanding use cases. Under supervision, it can reliably execute multi-step workflows and coding tasks while sustaining frontier performance.

**Create richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics with 3.5 Flash.** 3.5 Flash builds on the strong multimodal foundation of [Gemini 3](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gemini/gemini-3-examples-demos/). Watch as 3.5 Flash generates different UX approaches for a checkout flow in just 60 seconds on AI Studio.

3.5 Flash on AI Studio

**Try personal AI agents and new intelligent experiences.** 3.5 Flash is now the default model for the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search globally. Its agentic capabilities are powering new features to bring frontier-level intelligence to your daily life.

The enhanced agentic coding capabilities of 3.5 Flash are delivering [even more intelligent experiences in Search](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/#search-agents), like our new information agents. Operating in the background, 24/7, these agents intelligently reason across information to find exactly what you need at exactly the right moment. They will send a comprehensive update along with links to the web to dive deeper, so you can take action. Information agents will launch first for Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers this summer.

An information agent keeps a user updated on whether any of their favorite athletes announce sneaker collabs or signature drops.

Now that we’re bringing the power of Google Antigravity and agentic coding capabilities of Gemini 3.5 Flash right into Search, [Search can build the ideal response](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/#agentic-coding), in the right format for your question — completely on the fly. So you can get custom generative UI, including visual tools and simulations, tailored precisely to your needs. These generative UI capabilities will be available for everyone in Search this summer, free of charge.

Search leverages 3.5 Flash to build an interactive visual explaining Gyroid patterns.

For your ongoing tasks like planning a wedding or establishing a new fitness routine, Search will also build you custom experiences – like dashboards, trackers or mini apps – that you can keep coming back to. You’ll be able to create your own custom experiences with Antigravity right in Search in the coming months, starting first for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in the U.S.

Search builds a custom fitness tracker.

Then there’s the new [Gemini Spark](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app/), your personal AI agent, which runs on Gemini 3.5 and uses the Antigravity harness. It runs 24/7, helping you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf while under your direction. It’s deeply integrated with the Workspace tools you rely on daily, like Gmail, Docs, Slides and more. Gemini Spark is now available to all Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S.

Gemini Spark creates a list of nut-free snacks, then adds them to Instacart.

Gemini Omni Flash is rolling out to all [Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra](https://one.google.com/about/google-ai-plans/) subscribers globally through the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google.com/) and [Google Flow](https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow). It’s also rolling out at no cost to users on [YouTube Shorts and YouTube Create App](https://blog.youtube/news-and-events/youtube-news-google-io-2026/). In the coming weeks, we'll also be rolling it out to developers and enterprise customers via APIs.

Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available via [Google Antigravity](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-developer-highlights), the Gemini API in [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/) and [Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio), [Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform](https://console.cloud.google.com/agent-platform/overview) and [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise). It’s also available for everyone in [AI Mode in Search](https://g.ai/) and now rolling out to everyone globally in the [Gemini app](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app/).

Collection

## I/O 2026

At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.

![Image 2: I/O 2026](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/IOCollection_social.width-800.format-webp.webp)
entries.contentZh:
2026年5月29日

|

9分钟阅读

借助 Gemini Omni，Gemini 的推理能力与创造能力相结合，而 Gemini 3.5 则旨在帮助你执行复杂的智能体工作流程。

* * *

* * *

![图片1：Gemini Omni 与 Gemini 3.5 主图](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Gemini_Omni_and_Gemini_3.5_heroso.width-200.format-webp.webp)

[音频 3](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/media/tts_audio_85175_umbriel_2026_05_29_18_43_56.wav)

收听文章

[[duration]] 分钟

此内容由 Google AI 生成。生成式 AI 处于实验阶段。

在 [Google I/O 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-collection/) 上，我们发布了最新模型：[Gemini Omni](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni/) 和 [Gemini 3.5](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/) 模型系列。

Gemini Omni 是我们的新模型，能够从任何输入创建任何内容，首先从视频开始。借助 Omni，你可以将图像、音频、视频和文本作为输入，并生成基于 Gemini 真实世界知识的高质量视频。你还可以通过对话轻松编辑视频。

此外，还有 Gemini 3.5，这是我们最新的模型系列，将前沿智能与行动能力相结合。这代表着在构建更强大、更智能的智能体方面迈出了重大一步。我们通过发布 3.5 Flash 来开启这一系列。它为智能体和编码提供了前沿性能，擅长处理复杂的长期任务，带来实际效用。

为了让你更清晰地了解 Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 Flash，以下是 9 个演示，展示它们能帮助你完成的任务。

## Gemini Omni

**通过对话编辑视频。** Omni 的一项独特能力是提供更简单的视频编辑方式——使用自然语言。每条指令都基于上一条指令。你的角色保持一致，物理效果保持稳定，场景记住之前的内容。这意味着你可以改变周围的世界。更改特定内容，或更改一切。你的视频成为起点，创造出你永远无法亲自拍摄的内容。

提示：用气泡制作雕塑。

**重新构想动作。** 拍摄一段视频，只需要求 Omni 改变正在发生的事情。编辑动作，添加新角色或物体，或将某个时刻转变为意想不到的内容。

提示：调暗房间灯光。将一个黑白棋盘格房间放入一个玻璃球中，玻璃球漂浮在手部上方并跟踪手部运动，球内包含同一只手握住球体的递归表示，形成无限递归的房间。摄像机缓慢靠近球体，创建视频循环。

**通过多轮对话优化视频。** 更改环境、角度、风格甚至具体细节，而不会丢失原始场景的脉络。滚动轮播查看编辑如何相互叠加。

## Gemini 3.5 Flash

**大规模处理智能体任务。** 3.5 Flash 在多个维度上提供与大型旗舰模型相媲美的智能，同时保持 Flash 系列一贯的速度。这种速度与性能的平衡使 3.5 Flash 成为处理长期智能体任务的理想选择。在这里，由 Antigravity 驱动，3.5 Flash 执行多步骤工作流，根据动态标准自动重命名和分类非结构化资产。

由 Antigravity 驱动的 3.5 Flash

当与更新的 Antigravity 框架结合时，3.5 Flash 成为部署协作子智能体的强大引擎，以大规模解决最苛刻用例中的问题。在监督下，它可以可靠地执行多步骤工作流和编码任务，同时保持前沿性能。

**使用 3.5 Flash 创建更丰富、更具交互性的 Web UI 和图形。** 3.5 Flash 建立在 [Gemini 3](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gemini/gemini-3-examples-demos/) 强大的多模态基础之上。观看 3.5 Flash 在 AI Studio 上仅用 60 秒生成结账流程的不同 UX 方案。

AI Studio 上的 3.5 Flash

**尝试个人 AI 智能体和新的智能体验。** 3.5 Flash 现已成为全球 Gemini 应用和搜索中 AI 模式的默认模型。其智能体能力正在驱动新功能，将前沿智能带入你的日常生活。

3.5 Flash 增强的智能体编码能力正在为[搜索带来更智能的体验](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/#search-agents)，例如我们的新信息智能体。这些智能体全天候在后台运行，智能地跨信息进行推理，在恰当时刻找到你所需的内容。它们会发送全面更新，并附上网络链接供你深入探索，以便你采取行动。信息智能体将于今年夏天首先面向 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 订阅用户推出。

信息智能体持续更新用户，告知其最喜爱的运动员是否宣布了运动鞋联名或签名款发布。

现在，我们将 Google Antigravity 的强大功能和 Gemini 3.5 Flash 的智能体编码能力直接引入搜索，[搜索可以即时构建理想回复](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/#agentic-coding)，以适合你问题的格式呈现。因此，你可以获得自定义生成式 UI，包括视觉工具和模拟，精确满足你的需求。这些生成式 UI 功能将于今年夏天免费向所有搜索用户开放。

搜索利用 3.5 Flash 构建交互式视觉内容，解释 Gyroid 图案。

对于你正在进行的任务，例如策划婚礼或建立新的健身计划，搜索还将为你构建自定义体验——如仪表盘、追踪器或迷你应用——你可以随时返回使用。未来几个月内，你将能够在搜索中直接使用 Antigravity 创建自己的自定义体验，首先面向美国地区的 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 订阅用户。

搜索构建自定义健身追踪器。

此外，还有全新的 [Gemini Spark](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app/)，你的个人 AI 智能体，它运行在 Gemini 3.5 上，并使用 Antigravity 框架。它全天候运行，帮助你驾驭数字生活，在你的指导下代表你采取行动。它与你日常依赖的 Workspace 工具深度集成，如 Gmail、文档、幻灯片等。Gemini Spark 现已面向美国所有 Google AI Ultra 订阅用户开放。

Gemini Spark 创建一份无坚果零食清单，然后将其添加到 Instacart。

Gemini Omni Flash 正在向全球所有 [Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra](https://one.google.com/about/google-ai-plans/) 订阅用户推出，可通过 [Gemini 应用](https://gemini.google.com/) 和 [Google Flow](https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow) 使用。同时，它也在 [YouTube Shorts 和 YouTube Create 应用](https://blog.youtube/news-and-events/youtube-news-google-io-2026/) 上免费向用户推出。未来几周，我们还将通过 API 向开发者及企业客户推出。

Gemini 3.5 Flash 现已通过 [Google Antigravity](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/google-io-2026-developer-highlights)、[Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/) 和 [Android Studio](https://developer.android.com/studio) 中的 Gemini API、[Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform](https://console.cloud.google.com/agent-platform/overview) 以及 [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise) 全面开放。此外，所有用户均可通过 [搜索中的 AI 模式](https://g.ai/) 使用，并正在向全球所有 [Gemini 应用](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/next-evolution-gemini-app/) 用户推出。

合集

## I/O 2026

在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让 AI 对每个人都更有帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

![图片 2：I/O 2026](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/IOCollection_social.width-800.format-webp.webp)
