entries.summaryZh: OpenAI与马耳他合作扩大AI接入，提供ChatGPT Plus和培训，帮助公民培养实用AI技能并负责任地使用AI。

entries.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
entries.summary: Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.
entries.content:
May 19, 2026

|

10 min read

Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.

* * *

Oriol Vinyals

Vice President, Google DeepMind

Noam Shazeer

Vice President, Google DeepMind

* * *

![Image 1: Gemini 3.5 text and multi-colored star icon on an abstract blue background.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/gemini-3-5__keyword__blog-header_.width-200.format-webp.webp)

In this article
*   [Gemini 3.5 Flash](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#gemini-3-5-flash)
*   [Frontier intelligence, exceptional speed](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#frontier-intelligence)
*   [Agentic tasks at scale](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#agentic-tasks)
*   [Richer graphics](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#richer-graphics)
*   [Real-world impact](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#real-world)
*   [Personal AI agents](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#personal-agents)
*   [Built with Frontier safeguards](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#frontier-safeguards)
*   [Available today](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#available-today)

Today, we’re introducing Gemini 3.5, our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action. This represents a major leap forward in building more capable, intelligent agents. We’re kicking off the series by releasing 3.5 Flash. It delivers frontier performance for agents and coding, excelling at complex long-horizon tasks that deliver real-world utility.

3.5 Flash is available today to billions of people globally:

*   For everyone via the Gemini app and AI Mode in [Google Search](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026)
*   For developers in our agent-first development platform Google Antigravity and Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Android Studio
*   For enterprises in Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Gemini Enterprise.

We’re also hard at work on 3.5 Pro. It's already being used internally, and we look forward to rolling it out next month.

## 3.5 Flash: frontier performance for agents and coding

Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models on multiple dimensions, at the speeds you have come to expect from the Flash series. It’s our strongest agentic and coding model yet, outperforming Gemini 3.1 Pro on challenging coding and agentic benchmarks like Terminal-Bench 2.1 (76.2%), GDPval-AA (1656 Elo) and MCP Atlas (83.6%), and leading in multimodal understanding (84.2% on CharXiv Reasoning). When looking at output tokens per second, it is 4 times faster than other frontier models.

Landing in the top-right quadrant of the Artificial Analysis index, 3.5 Flash delivers frontier-level intelligence at exceptional speed — proving you no longer have to trade quality for latency.

## 3.5 Flash: agentic tasks at scale

This balance of speed and performance makes 3.5 Flash ideal for tackling long-horizon agentic tasks. What used to take a developer days or an auditor weeks, 3.5 Flash can now help complete in a fraction of the time, often at less than half the cost of other frontier models. It rapidly plans, builds and iterates to solve real-world problems, whether it’s developing new applications, maintaining codebases or helping to prepare financial documents.

When coupled with the updated Antigravity harness, 3.5 Flash becomes a powerful engine for deploying collaborative subagents to tackle problems at scale for the most demanding use cases. Under supervision, it can reliably execute multi-step workflows and coding tasks while sustaining frontier performance.

Building on the strong multimodal foundation of Gemini 3, 3.5 Flash generates richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics.

## 3.5 Flash: real-world impact

3.5 Flash’s real-world agentic capabilities are already driving meaningful progress for our developers and enterprises alike. In developing the 3.5 model series, we worked closely with industry partners to understand where toil and complexity arose in their workflows. Partners are seeing meaningful impact — from banks and fintechs automating multi-week workflows to data science teams unearthing insights amidst complex data environments.

## Personal AI agents: built with 3.5 Flash

3.5 Flash is now the default model for the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search globally. At I/O today, we showed how its agentic capabilities are powering new features to bring frontier-level intelligence to your daily life.

The new Gemini Spark, your personal AI agent, uses 3.5 Flash. It runs 24/7, helping you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf while under your direction. We’re starting to roll out Gemini Spark to trusted testers today, and we’re planning on bringing the Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers in the US next week.

The enhanced agentic coding capabilities of 3.5 Flash are also delivering even more intelligent experiences across Search, from introducing new information agents that work for you 24/7 to unlocking more dynamic generative UI experiences. [Learn more in our blog post](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026).

Search leverages 3.5 Flash to build an interactive visual explaining Gyroid patterns.

## Gemini 3.5: built with frontier safeguards

Gemini 3.5 was developed in accordance with our Frontier Safety Framework. We have strengthened our cyber and CBRN safeguards, which means it's less likely to generate harmful content, and to mistakenly refuse to answer safe queries. We achieve this with new, more advanced safety training and mitigations, including [interpretability tools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.11516v4) that help check and understand the AI's inner reasoning before it provides a response.

## 3.5 Flash is available today

Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available via Google Antigravity, the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Android Studio, [Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform](https://console.cloud.google.com/agent-platform/overview) and [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?e=48754805). It’s also now available to everyone in the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search. On behalf of the entire Gemini team, we can’t wait to see what you build.

Collection

## I/O 2026

Here’s a look at everything we announced at Google I/O 2026.

![Image 2: The image shows a colorful abstract design with the Google I/O 2026 logo.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/IOCollection_social.width-800.format-webp.webp)
entries.contentZh:
2026年5月19日

|

10分钟阅读

Gemini 3.5 旨在帮助您执行复杂的智能体工作流。

* * *

Oriol Vinyals

副总裁，Google DeepMind

Noam Shazeer

副总裁，Google DeepMind

* * *

![图片1：Gemini 3.5 文字及多色星形图标，背景为抽象蓝色。](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/gemini-3-5__keyword__blog-header_.width-200.format-webp.webp)

本文内容
*   [Gemini 3.5 Flash](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#gemini-3-5-flash)
*   [前沿智能，非凡速度](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#frontier-intelligence)
*   [大规模智能体任务](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#agentic-tasks)
*   [更丰富的图形](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#richer-graphics)
*   [现实世界影响](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#real-world)
*   [个人AI智能体](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#personal-agents)
*   [以前沿安全措施构建](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#frontier-safeguards)
*   [今日可用](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-5-frontier-intelligence-with-action/#available-today)

今天，我们推出 Gemini 3.5，这是我们最新的模型系列，将前沿智能与行动能力相结合。这代表着在构建更强大、更智能的智能体方面迈出了重大一步。我们通过发布 3.5 Flash 来开启这一系列。它为智能体和编码提供了前沿性能，擅长执行复杂的长期任务，带来实际效用。

3.5 Flash 今日起面向全球数十亿用户可用：

*   面向所有人，通过 Gemini 应用和 [Google 搜索](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026)中的 AI 模式
*   面向开发者，在我们的智能体优先开发平台 Google Antigravity 以及 Google AI Studio 和 Android Studio 中的 Gemini API 中
*   面向企业，在 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform 和 Gemini Enterprise 中。

我们也在全力开发 3.5 Pro。它已在内部使用，我们期待下个月推出。

## 3.5 Flash：面向智能体和编码的前沿性能

Gemini 3.5 Flash 在多个维度上提供了可与大型旗舰模型媲美的智能，同时保持了 Flash 系列一贯的速度。这是我们迄今为止最强大的智能体和编码模型，在 Terminal-Bench 2.1（76.2%）、GDPval-AA（1656 Elo）和 MCP Atlas（83.6%）等具有挑战性的编码和智能体基准测试中超越了 Gemini 3.1 Pro，并在多模态理解方面领先（CharXiv Reasoning 上为 84.2%）。就每秒输出 token 数而言，它比其他前沿模型快 4 倍。

3.5 Flash 位于 Artificial Analysis 指数的右上象限，以非凡的速度提供前沿级别的智能——证明您不再需要在质量和延迟之间做出取舍。

## 3.5 Flash：大规模智能体任务

这种速度与性能的平衡使 3.5 Flash 成为处理长期智能体任务的理想选择。过去需要开发者数天或审计员数周的工作，3.5 Flash 现在可以在极短的时间内帮助完成，成本通常不到其他前沿模型的一半。它能快速规划、构建和迭代，以解决现实世界的问题，无论是开发新应用、维护代码库还是帮助准备财务文档。

当与更新的 Antigravity 框架结合使用时，3.5 Flash 成为部署协作子智能体的强大引擎，以大规模解决最苛刻用例中的问题。在监督下，它可以可靠地执行多步骤工作流和编码任务，同时保持前沿性能。

基于 Gemini 3 强大的多模态基础，3.5 Flash 生成了更丰富、更具交互性的 Web UI 和图形。

## 3.5 Flash：现实世界影响

3.5 Flash 的现实世界智能体能力已经为我们的开发者和企业带来了有意义的进展。在开发 3.5 模型系列时，我们与行业合作伙伴密切合作，了解其工作流中产生辛劳和复杂性的环节。合作伙伴看到了显著的影响——从银行和金融科技公司自动化数周的工作流，到数据科学团队在复杂数据环境中挖掘洞察。

## 个人AI智能体：基于 3.5 Flash 构建

3.5 Flash 现已成为全球 Gemini 应用和搜索中 AI 模式的默认模型。在今天的 I/O 大会上，我们展示了其智能体能力如何驱动新功能，将前沿级别的智能带入您的日常生活。

新的 Gemini Spark，您的个人 AI 智能体，使用了 3.5 Flash。它全天候运行，帮助您驾驭数字生活，在您的指导下代表您采取行动。我们今天开始向受信任的测试者推出 Gemini Spark，并计划下周向美国的 Google AI Ultra 订阅者提供 Beta 版本。

3.5 Flash 增强的智能体编码能力也在搜索中带来更智能的体验，从引入全天候为您工作的新信息智能体，到解锁更具动态性的生成式 UI 体验。[在我们的博客文章中了解更多](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026)。

搜索利用 3.5 Flash 构建了一个解释 Gyroid 图案的交互式可视化。

## Gemini 3.5：以前沿安全措施构建

Gemini 3.5 是根据我们的前沿安全框架开发的。我们加强了网络和 CBRN 安全措施，这意味着它生成有害内容的可能性更低，并且错误拒绝安全查询的可能性也更低。我们通过新的、更先进的安全训练和缓解措施实现了这一点，包括[可解释性工具](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.11516v4)，这些工具在 AI 提供响应之前帮助检查和理解其内部推理。

## 3.5 Flash 今日可用

Gemini 3.5 Flash 现已通过 Google Antigravity、Google AI Studio 和 Android Studio 中的 Gemini API、[Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform](https://console.cloud.google.com/agent-platform/overview) 和 [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?e=48754805) 全面可用。它现在也可供所有人通过 Gemini 应用和搜索中的 AI 模式使用。代表整个 Gemini 团队，我们迫不及待地想看到您构建的成果。

合集

# How business operations teams use ChatGPT Work

Explore how business operations teams can use ChatGPT Work to turn scattered initiative context, metrics, trackers, and stakeholder input into decision-ready briefs, updates, packets, and tradeoff models.

[Download ChatGPT Work(opens in a new window)](https://chatgpt.com/codex/for-work/)

Loading…

[Audio 2](https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex)

Share

Watch the on-demand webinar

*   [Watch the on-demand webinar](https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex#watch-the-on-demand-webinar) 
*   [Top ChatGPT Work use cases for business operations teams](https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex#top-chatgpt-work-use-cases-for-business-operations-teams) 

*   [Watch the on-demand webinar](https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex#watch-the-on-demand-webinar) 
*   [Top ChatGPT Work use cases for business operations teams](https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex#top-chatgpt-work-use-cases-for-business-operations-teams) 

Business operations work often starts across project trackers, KPI dashboards, planning docs, meeting notes, Slack threads, spreadsheets, and executive asks. ChatGPT Workhelps pull that context together and produce the first usable version of the artifact: an off-track brief, strategic initiative update, leadership decision packet, progress update, or scenario model. Your team still owns the judgment and recommendation; ChatGPT Work helps get the working draft in front of the right people faster.

Watch **_How business operations teams use Codex_** on-demand [**here**⁠(opens in a new window)](https://academy.openai.com/home/clubs/work-users-ynjqu/videos/how-business-operations-teams-use-codex-2026-06-17).

**Note:** This webinar was recorded when these workflows lived in the former Codex app. You can now follow along using ChatGPT Work at chatgpt.com or in the ChatGPT desktop app.

Ready to try ChatGPT Work on real business operations work? Check out our use cases [here.⁠(opens in a new window)](https://learn.chatgpt.com/use-cases/collections/business-operations)
